title: Speaking - Part 2
description: Look at the photograph and say what you can see.

tasks.instructions: Here is your photograph. It shows people visiting a castle. Please tell us what you can see in the photograph.

images.label: A
images.description: A family is visiting an old castle on a sunny day. The children are looking up at a tall stone tower while their parents are reading a visitor guide. There is a grassy courtyard and an old wall around them.

followUp.question: Talk about the people. Talk about the place. Talk about other things in the photograph.

tasks.instructions: Here is your photograph. It shows someone cleaning a bedroom. Please tell us what you can see in the photograph.

images.label: B
images.description: A teenage boy is cleaning his bedroom. He is putting clothes into a basket beside his bed. There are books on a desk, a football on the floor and an open window in the room.

followUp.question: Talk about the person. Talk about the place. Talk about other things in the photograph.
